evals.prompt: Review this Senior Data Engineer JD for our London office and check if the salary range is competitive.
evals.expected_output: Collects JD text, runs analysis with location_hint=London, presents quality scores, bias flags, salary benchmarks, and extracted skills.

assertions.name: runs_analysis
assertions.description: Calls atlas_start_jd_analysis with JD text and location hint

assertions.name: shows_salary
assertions.description: Presents salary benchmark data for the role

assertions.name: shows_bias
assertions.description: Shows any bias or inclusivity flags
